title: Bot run-logging gap: confirm-gate update/delete never write runs.jsonl
path: light (issue #136 carried root-cause + Option-1 fix sketch + acceptance; P0.5 diagnose effectively done in the issue → resumed at P5 dispatch, design pre-resolved by orchestrator)
fix: Thread optional onCommit?: (note)=>void through resolvePending → handleConfirmDecision → commit in services/bot/confirm/gate.ts; fire onCommit(`${intent}: ${title}`) only after successful writeFile. Router passes (note)=>emitAction(deps, note) so emitAction stays the SINGLE never-throw logging seam — no deps/onAction leaked into the gate. Refinement of issue Option 1 (avoids leaking deps).

gate.ponytail_review: GREEN (1 nit: mark-done test duplicates update test — note construction doesn't branch on patch)
gate.eval: PASS (4/4 acceptance; design matches locked spec; tests non-vacuous — revert onCommit → tests fail)

notes: Hotspot services/bot/router.ts touched but dispatched ALONE (no other bot slice in flight) — one-line call-site change only. Worktree came up with node_modules missing in both root and services/bot; implementer ran npm install in both to make suites runnable (pre-existing env state, not part of the fix).
